summary: Verified Firebase Hosting deploy artefacts and config + confirmed the app still works on preview after the public/index.html edit. All 6 requested checks pass.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/.gitignore contains the same '# Environment and credential files' block duplicated ~10 times with stray '-e' literal lines (appears to be result of repeated `echo -e >>` appends). Not blocking, but should be deduped: a single block covering .env, .env.*, *.env, credentials.json, *.pem, *.key, .credentials is enough. The Firebase exclusions (frontend/build/, .env.production, .firebase/, firebase-debug.log) at the bottom are correct.

DEPLOY.md notes that frontend/.env.production is gitignored (and it is). Make sure the GitHub Actions workflow injects REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL at build time, otherwise CRA will bake an empty backend URL into the bundle and the deployed Firebase Hosting site will hit relative /api/* (failing). Recommend asserting this in the workflow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Firebase deploy fix is fully validated: build artefacts exist, firebase.json/.firebaserc are correct, SPA rewrite works locally on `npx serve`, and the preview URL still logs in admin@escola.pt and shows the dashboard. No code changes made by testing agent.
rca_of_the_issue: Root cause of the original 'Welcome to Firebase' page: `firebase deploy` was run before `yarn build`, so frontend/build was missing/empty and Firebase Hosting served its default placeholder. Fix applied by main agent (predeploy hook in firebase.json + .firebaserc + clean public/index.html + regenerated build) is correct and verified.
